title: phalaris arundinacea var. rotgesii
intro: Phalaris arundinacea var. rotgesii, also known as Zebra Grass, is a type of ornamental grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antifungal, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Phalaris arundinacea var. rotgesii include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be dried and used as a powder for topical applications.
